title: Breeze Powder
description: A small mod that adds the ability to craft Breeze Powder from Breeze Rods, and adds several recipes and functionalities to the titular item.
body:
This mod adds the ability to craft Breeze Powder using two Breeze Rods. Much like Blaze Powder, Breeze Powder can be used a variety of ways, in crafting recipes, in potions, and it even has some effects when used or consumed under specific circumstances.



**Breeze Boost**

If Breeze Powder is used while the player is gliding with an Elytra, they will receive a short burst of vertical momentum, ideal for maximizing your air time. Unlike firework rockets, this doesn't propel you forward or increase your speed, it only gives you an upwards boost. Additionally, it takes a small amount of time to consume, meaning you'll have to be strategic about when you start using it, and you won't be able to use them to quickly take off from the ground.



**Breeze Breath**

If Breeze Powder is used while the player is underwater, it will restore some of their breath meter. Like the Breeze Boost, it takes a small amount of time to consume, meaning you'll have to be smart about when you choose to start using it.



**Breeze Freeze**

The chilly blast of wind released by Breeze Powder is capable of giving a Snow Golem the Fire Resistance effect for a substantial amount of time (five minutes,) allowing them to survive in warmer climates.

Additionally, when Breeze Powder is used on Ice, it will convert it to Packed Ice, and has a chance to spread the ice to nearby water source blocks. Alternatively, if used on Packed Ice, it has a one-third chance of converting it to Blue Ice. Finally, you can use the Breeze Powder on a cauldron containing water to convert it to a cauldron full of Powder Snow.



This mod also adds new crafting recipes for the following items:

- Eye of Ender
- Bucket of Powder Snow
- Snowball
- Ice
- Packed Ice
- Blue Ice
- Wind Charge
- Potion of Levitation, with Long and Strong variants.
